original_image_tags: A typed letter on off-white paper, showing signs of age. At the top right, the words "TRUE COPY" are typed, partially obscured by two dark ink smudges. The letter is formatted with standard business correspondence layout. A rectangular yellowed tape residue or stain is visible on the left margin. There is a small, handwritten notation or initial in the bottom right corner, appearing to be "EK" or similar within a circle or scribble.

elements.description: Typed letter with text and a handwritten annotation. There are no embedded photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts.

judge.reason: Description A describes specific visual elements (ink smudges, tape residue, handwritten 'EK' notation) that are completely absent in Description B, which claims there are no embedded images or charts, indicating the descriptions are about different visual content.
